title: Typed Error Result with Discriminated Union
description: A type-safe pattern for returning either a success value or a structured error without throwing exceptions. Useful for service layer functions where errors are expected outcomes, not exceptional cases.

title: Constructor-Based Dependency Injection
description: Pass dependencies through constructors for testability and loose coupling. Enables easy mocking in tests and swapping implementations without modifying business logic.

title: Composable Middleware Chain
description: A middleware pattern that allows composing multiple processing steps into a pipeline. Each middleware can modify the request, short-circuit with a response, or pass to the next handler.

title: Resilient API Call with Retry Logic
description: Wraps async operations with configurable retry logic using exponential backoff and jitter. Handles transient failures like network timeouts or rate-limited API responses.

title: Type-Safe Event Bus
description: A strongly-typed event emitter that enforces event name and payload types at compile time. Prevents typos and mismatched event data across the application.

title: Database Transaction Context Manager
description: A Python context manager that wraps database transactions with automatic commit/rollback. Ensures connections are always released even when exceptions occur.
code:
from contextlib import contextmanager
from typing import Generator
import psycopg2
from psycopg2.extras import RealDictCursor

@contextmanager
def transaction(db_url: str) -> Generator:
    """Provide a transactional scope around a series of operations."""
    conn = psycopg2.connect(db_url)
    cursor = conn.cursor(cursor_factory=RealDictCursor)
    try:
        yield cursor
        conn.commit()
    except Exception:
        conn.rollback()
        raise
    finally:
        cursor.close()
        conn.close()

# Usage
with transaction(DATABASE_URL) as cur:
    cur.execute("UPDATE users SET last_login = NOW() WHERE id = %s", (user_id,))
    cur.execute("INSERT INTO audit_log (action, user_id) VALUES (%s, %s)",
                ("login", user_id))

title: Runtime Input Validation with Type Inference
description: Validates and parses unknown input at runtime while inferring the TypeScript type statically. Catches invalid data at the boundary before it reaches business logic.

title: Token Bucket Rate Limiter
description: Implements the token bucket algorithm for rate limiting. Allows short bursts of requests while enforcing an average rate over time. Useful for API rate limiting and resource protection.

title: Generic Resource Pool
description: A generic pool that manages reusable resources like database connections, browser instances, or worker threads. Handles acquisition, release, and cleanup of idle resources.

title: Redis-Based Pub/Sub with Type Safety
description: Wraps Redis pub/sub to provide a typed message bus across processes. Enables communication between separate service instances without direct coupling.

title: Circuit Breaker for External Service Calls
description: Prevents cascading failures by stopping requests to a failing external service. After a threshold of failures, the circuit opens and fast-fails. Periodically tests recovery with a half-open state.

title: Pydantic Model with Validation and Serialization
description: Uses Pydantic to define data models with automatic validation, serialization, and type coercion. Provides a clean boundary between raw input and validated domain objects.
